🌅 Market News Digest
[Jul 15-16, 2026 EST]

🔥 Top Stories
• Escalating U.S.-Iran conflict rattles markets — fresh strikes, drone/missile attacks, Hormuz risk keep oil elevated and risk assets shaky
• TSMC tops earnings and boosts outlook — record AI-driven demand, 3Q sales above estimates, FY capex raised to up to $64B, plus another $100B U.S. investment
• Soft U.S. inflation cools Fed-hike fears — weaker PPI lifted stocks/bonds and supported gold, though energy/geopolitics quickly offset the calm

⛽ Oil & Energy
• WTI/breent rally on Mideast risk — crude topped $80 as shipping threats, tanker incidents and U.S. strikes raised supply fears
• Iraq Basra loadings disrupted — drone strike on tanker briefly halted southern oil loadings before later reports said loading resumed
• BHP, ITOCHU approve Ministers North iron ore project — WA mine targets 20Mt/yr from H2 2028

📊 Markets & Macro
• Asia sell-off led by tech — KOSPI fell as much as 7%, Nikkei and Shanghai weaker; U.S. futures slipped on AI valuation worries
• BOK hikes 25 bps to 2.75% — warns on inflation, housing and household debt; implies more tightening possible
• UK growth beats but stays mixed — May GDP +0.1% m/m, services okay, but construction weak and trade deficit still wide
• Japan yields surge — long-end JGBs climbed further while yen firmed; finance ministry signaled readiness to intervene if needed

🌍 Geopolitical
• Iran conflict broadens — Kuwait, Jordan, Bahrain and Iraqi targets/intercepts highlighted regional spillover risk
• Ukraine leadership reset — Zelenskyy nominated Sergii Koretskyi as prime minister; parliament confirmed him later
• U.S.-Brazil trade clash escalates — Washington moved to impose 25% tariffs on select Brazilian goods; Brazil plans reciprocity-law response

🪙 Crypto & DeFi
• Open-source AI/crypto crossover — xAI opened Grok build source code
• Hyperliquid ecosystem expands — Hyperion entered a new $500K HYPE bond deal
• Kraken flagged EUR/GBP banking delays — SEPA and GBP rails may be slow due to Banking Circle issue

🏛️ Regulatory & Policy
• South Korea clamps down on leveraged ETF risk — regulators to halt new single-stock leveraged ETFs and raise minimum deposit to 30M won
• U.S. targets China trade/tech exposure — probes on IP, forced labor and rare earths continue; lawmakers push to ban Chinese memory chips
• UK nationalizes British Steel — government takes control to protect strategic steelmaking capacity
• South Korea macro stance stays hawkish — BoK says inflation and FX volatility remain elevated, growth looks stronger than expected

🏢 Corporate
• UnitedHealth beats handily — Q2 EPS and revenue topped estimates; FY EPS guide raised to $19.50-$20
• GE Aerospace beats and lifts FCF outlook — stronger commercial engines demand and higher free cash flow guidance
• Abb buys Rotork; Uber bids for Delivery Hero — fresh M&A in industrials and delivery/tech
• NVIDIA widens robotics/AI partnerships — deals with Toyota, Hitachi, Fujitsu, Fanuc, Yaskawa and others
• Eli Lilly nears psychedelic-drug deal — set to buy Atai Beckley for mental-health treatments
